Sender: GRUN BROTHERS (J. GREEN & Co. Successors), Manufacturer's Agents, Government Contractors, General Importers and Exporters
Brief_Summary: GRUN BROTHERS sent an invoice for P.33.6 to the Antiquities Service for goods delivered to their Doktor Effendi, requesting prompt remittance.
English_Translation:
GRUN BROTHERS
(J. GREEN & Co. Successors)

MANUFACTURER'S AGENTS
GOVERNMENT CONTRACTORS
GENERAL IMPORTERS
AND EXPORTERS

HEAD OFFICE:
147, SHARIA EMAD EL DINE, CAIRO
P. O. Box 600 - Telephone 59948
Telegrams "NURG"
Reg. Comm. No. 25998 Cairo

ALEXANDRIA
P. O. Box 1722
Tel. 28666
Telegrams "NURG"
Reg. Comm. No. 1722 Alex.

SUDAN
P. O. Box 193
Telegrams "NURG"
KHARTOUM

Cairo, 9th June 1938
Ref. N°A/903

Antiquities Service,
Pyramids Excavations,
Pyramids.
-----

Dear Sirs,

We beg to enclose herewith our invoice N°1769,
in triplicate, amounting to P.33.6 for goods delivered
to your Doktor Effendi. Your remittance at your earliest
convenience will oblige.

Always at your service, we beg to remain, dear
Sir,

Yours faithfully;
GRUN BROTHERS
J. GREEN & Co. Succs.

Encl.

LI/VR
Stamps_and_Annotations: Partially visible circular company stamp, likely GRUN BROTHERS
